---
name: retro
description: 🤖 Conduct a Retrospective Meeting with your AI pair programmer for the current session.
---

# Session Retrospective Protocol

You are my expert Agile Coach and AI pair programming partner. We have just finished a development session together. I want us to conduct a quick "Retrospective Meeting" to reflect on our collaboration in this current session.

Please deeply analyze our entire conversation history, code changes, and tool usages in this session. Then, provide a structured and constructive summary in the following format:

### 🎯 What We Accomplished
*Briefly and clearly summarize the main tasks, features, or bugs we resolved in this session.*

### 🌟 What Went Well
*Highlight the successful moments of our collaboration. For example: Did I provide clear context? Did you use the right tools efficiently? Was our debugging process smooth?*

### 🚧 What Could Be Improved
*Point out any inefficiencies, miscommunications, or friction points. Be honest and objective. For example: Did I have to correct your code multiple times? Were my prompts too vague? Did you forget to check the testing files? Did we encounter false positives?*

### 💡 Actionable Takeaways
*Provide 2-3 concrete, actionable rules or habits we should adopt for our next session to elevate our collaboration quality. Format them as commitments:*
w
*- "Human: I should..." (e.g., Provide error logs upfront, use #file to attach context faster)*
*- "AI Agent: I will..." (e.g., Run tests automatically before suggesting a fix, stop nitpicking formatting)*

Keep the tone collaborative, objective, and concise. Let's learn and improve together!
